headline: Hedge Fund Broadwood Capital Added Over 1 Million Shares of STAAR Surgical to Its Position. Here's What That Means for Investors.
summary: STAAR Surgical supplies implantable lenses for vision correction, serving ophthalmic surgeons and clinics globally with proprietary tech.

headline: Nvidia, Meta and Schlumberger rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.
